'''Theala Vandron''' was the [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] of [[House Vandron]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. Theala was described as heavyset and stately.

She had been called to appear before the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Court of Justice]] that same year over charges of planet-stripping and violations of the [[Rights of Sentience]]. This stemmed from the fact that she was allowing slavers to run breeding farms on her [[Karfeddion/Legends|homeworld]], while at the same time she had met with [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda]] and [[Irek Ismaren]] about bringing the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]'' to [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]. When the plan failed Roganda and Irek escaped using her own personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]].
